name: xianjian-fairy-tale
description: 仙剑奇侠传3 同人 ARPG 小游戏 - 三端共通(Web/APP/小程序)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
